title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say why the people might need a break and how the break might help them.

images.label: A
images.description: A tired office worker sitting at a desk with their eyes closed and a coffee cup nearby.

images.label: B
images.description: A mountain climber sitting on a rock, looking out over a vast valley to rest.

images.label: C
images.description: A student in a library leaning their head on their books during a study session.

followUp.question: Who do you think needs the break the most? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what the people are enjoying about being creative and how difficult it might be to achieve the results they want.

images.label: D
images.description: An artist in a messy studio painting a large, colorful abstract canvas.

images.label: E
images.description: A young person at home recording a podcast or music using a professional microphone and laptop.

images.label: F
images.description: A gardener carefully designing and pruning a topiary or a complex flower bed.

followUp.question: In which situation is the person likely to feel the most satisfied? (Why?)
